series_metadata.series_description: Form sent by Business Counsel section to independent contractors or non-public employees hired by the AGO for contractual work informing them that they are not eligible for an Ohio Public Employee Retirement account (OPERS) during their contracted work. A redacted version of the form is made and sent to the Ohio Department of Administrative Services (DAS) by the Finance section and both the original and redacted versions of the form are maintained by the Finance section. Form also referred to as the "Look Forward" form.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from date services began, provided audited
